headline: T. Rowe Price (TROW) Joins Three Vanguard Equity Funds As Advisor
summary: Vanguard has appointed T. Rowe Price as an advisor to multiple active equity funds. The mandate covers three Vanguard equity funds, expanding T. Rowe Price's role with the asset manager. The move strengthens collaboration between two large fund providers in active equity management. T. Rowe Price Group (NasdaqGS:TROW) is stepping into a higher profile role as an advisor to several Vanguard active equity funds, adding another layer to its institutional footprint. The stock trades at $118.55,...
